antipatterns.name: Empty/TODO description
antipatterns.description: Description is empty, 'TODO', 'TBD', or placeholder text
antipatterns.fix: Write comprehensive description covering all user phrasings

antipatterns.name: Timid description
antipatterns.description: Description too short (<50 chars) to cover triggering phrasings
antipatterns.fix: Expand description to be assertive and comprehensive

antipatterns.name: Overbroad description
antipatterns.description: Description exceeds 1024 character limit or lacks clear boundaries
antipatterns.fix: Condense to <1024 chars and add clear scope boundaries

antipatterns.name: Body as reference dump
antipatterns.description: SKILL.md body is a reference dump instead of progressive disclosure
antipatterns.fix: Extract reference content to references/ directory

antipatterns.name: Missing quick reference
antipatterns.description: No quick reference section for common operations
antipatterns.fix: Add Quick Reference section at top of body

antipatterns.name: Passive instructions
antipatterns.description: Instructions use passive voice or vague suggestions
antipatterns.fix: Rewrite with concrete commands and active voice

antipatterns.name: MUST/NEVER without WHY
antipatterns.description: Uses MUST/NEVER commands without explaining rationale
antipatterns.fix: Add brief explanation of WHY after each mandate

antipatterns.name: Phantom file references
antipatterns.description: References files that don't exist in scripts/references/assets/
antipatterns.fix: Remove phantom references or create missing files

antipatterns.name: Orphaned files
antipatterns.description: Files present in directories but never referenced in SKILL.md
antipatterns.fix: Reference files in SKILL.md or remove if unused

antipatterns.name: README in disguise
antipatterns.fix: Extract content to references/ or condense

antipatterns.name: Description/body mismatch
antipatterns.description: Description promises features not covered in body
antipatterns.fix: Align description with actual body content

antipatterns.name: Monolithic reference file
antipatterns.description: Single massive reference file instead of organized structure
antipatterns.fix: Split into topic-specific files with ToC

antipatterns.name: Source code in assets
antipatterns.description: Source code files (.py, .js) in assets/ instead of scripts/
antipatterns.fix: Move source code to scripts/, keep only data/media in assets/

antipatterns.name: Example pollution
antipatterns.description: Too many examples obscure core instructions
antipatterns.fix: Keep 1-2 representative examples, extract rest to references/

antipatterns.name: No examples for transformation skills
antipatterns.fix: Add concrete before/after examples for transformations
